issue_body_preview:
I thought it was a core error, but testing and testing I see the problem is not in the core.

The problem is the example, I thought create a warning (https://github.com/nuxt-community/vuetify-module/issues/228), but i see the code of vue-cli-plugin and this plugins append the styles.sass in the bo
test_description_zh: 访问示例项目首页，检查 Vuetify 样式是否正确加载，页面组件（如按钮、布局等）是否正常渲染并应用了 Vuetify 主题样式
expected_result_zh: 页面正确加载 Vuetify 的样式文件（如 styles.sass），所有 Vuetify 组件正常渲染，具备正确的主题颜色、字体和布局，无样式缺失或控制台警告
